questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: The area of a rectangle of length $12$ and width $5$ is _____ .

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: Five years ago, a man was seven times as old as his son. The man is now $40$ years old. The son's present age is _____ years.
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Translate the past condition into an equation.

**Working.** Five years ago the man was $35$, so $35=7(\text{son}-5)\Rightarrow \text{son}-5=5\Rightarrow \text{son}=10$.

**Answer.** $10$ years.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: A scientist who studies the origin, composition and structure of rocks is a ____.
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Field names derive from their subject roots: 'petro-' means rock.

**Working.** A petrologist studies rocks; a cartographer makes maps, a meteorologist studies weather, and a hydrologist studies water.

**Answer.** petrologist.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.topic: Quantitative Aptitude — Time, Speed and Distance
questions.stem: Two trains $60$ km apart move toward each other at $40$ km/h and $20$ km/h. The time taken to meet is _____ hours.
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Closing speed = sum of speeds when moving toward each other.

**Working.** Relative speed $=40+20=60$ km/h; time $=\dfrac{60}{60}=1$ h.

**Answer.** $1$ hour.

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: A card is drawn at random from a standard $52$-card deck. The probability that it is an ace is _____ (round to two decimals).

questions.subject: General Aptitude
questions.stem: Which word reads the same when viewed in a vertical mirror?

figure.caption: The word MOM with a dashed vertical mirror line to its right.
figure.markup: <svg viewBox='0 0 220 110' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' role='img'><text x='30' y='72' font-size='52' fill='#334155'>MOM</text><line x1='195' y1='12' x2='195' y2='98' stroke='#94a3b8' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='4 3'/></svg>

questions.solution:
**Concept.** Each letter must be vertically symmetric and the word a palindrome.

**Working.** M, O, M are all vertically symmetric and 'MOM' is a palindrome, so the mirror image is identical.

**Answer.** MOM.

questions.stem: As per IS 456, the limiting neutral-axis depth ratio $x_{u,max}/d$ for Fe415 steel is
questions.solution:
**Concept.** IS 456 limiting $x_u/d$: Fe250 → 0.53, Fe415 → 0.48, Fe500 → 0.46.

**Working.**
$0.48$ for Fe415.

**Answer.** $0.48$

questions.subject: Foundation Engineering
questions.stem: The group efficiency of a pile group is generally defined as
options: group capacity ÷ sum of individual pile capacities
sum of pile capacities ÷ group capacity
questions.solution:
**Concept.** $\eta_g=\dfrac{Q_{group}}{n Q_{single}}$.

**Working.**
Group/Σ individual.

**Answer.** Group ÷ Σ individual

questions.subject: Structural Analysis
questions.stem: Which of the following are force (flexibility) methods of structural analysis?
questions.solution:
**Concept.** Consistent deformation & column analogy are force methods; slope-deflection & moment-distribution are displacement methods.

**Working.**
Options 1 and 2.

**Answer.** Consistent deformation & column analogy
